findings.annotation_source: Supplementary Table 3 provides DEGs used to annotate Pericytes in prenatal skin. Listed as fine-grained annotation under broad 'Mural cell' category.
findings.organoid_comparison: Even after 19 weeks of culture, mural cells (including pericytes) had a low probability of correspondence to adult skin cell states (Extended Data Fig. 2d, Supplementary Table 5).
findings.microenvironment: Mural cells co-locate with endothelial and neural cells in vascular microenvironments in prenatal skin.
findings.macrophage_interactions: Macrophage subsets co-locate with fibroblasts, neural cells and vascular cells (including mural cells) in distinct tissue microenvironments (Fig. 1d). LYVE1+ macrophages co-located with vascular cells and were predicted to interact through PDGFs and corresponding receptors (PDGFRalpha and PDGFRbeta).
findings.temporal_presence: Mural cells are present throughout gestation (Fig. 1c, Extended Data Fig. 1d, Supplementary Table 4).
